title: psychotria interior
intro: Psychotria interior, also known as the "Blue Angel" or "Malabar Kino," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria interior include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Psychotria interior typically involve drying and processing the leaves, which can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for consumption.
